scenario_scope: Triage the Corben-authored Relational Dimension Compiler paper across immediate existing-chapter integration and a distinct future chapter boundary while the active roadmap freezes manifest admission.

cases.decision_rationale: Dimensional typing, relational-order routing, relation reification, branch-local state, reversible contraction, compiled specialists, and total-cost evaluation materially improve existing owner interfaces even before a dedicated chapter can be adjudicated.
required_before_drafting: preserve argument-only support and explicit nonclaims
non_claims: does not make any existing chapter the full RDC owner

cases.decision_rationale: The conjunction of dimensional typing, semantic/computational/storage arity, persistent role-sensitive relation objects, relation qualification lifecycle, adaptive order, reversible semantic contraction, and RODIE has a distinct interface, invariant set, artifact family, failure taxonomy, and future source program. Active roadmap rules nevertheless prohibit a chapter path or manifest decision now.
required_before_drafting: formal ceiling and RODIE protocol frozen
evidence_transition_preconditions: later empirical movement requires matched RODIE or natural-task evidence
no source inheritance to chapter-core support
promotion_blockers: P2 and Round 16 resume gates incomplete
non_claims: does not reserve chapter order or guarantee admission
does not create a chapter file, manifest row, proof target, or reader insertion

validation_boundary: Records a passage-reviewed source integration and a deferred unique chapter candidate. It validates neither the RDC architecture nor its cited literature, representational propositions beyond their stated finite construction, benchmark feasibility, total-system advantage, or support movement.
non_claims: does not change chapter count or order
does not authorize protected empirical work
does not authorize release, deployment, or publication
